title: ipomoea erythocephala
intro: Ipomoea erythocephala, also known as the red-flowered morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which aid in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Ipomoea erythocephala can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed, or dried and used as a powder in herbal remedies.
